items.title: Surge Chronicle — cinematic comeback overlay
items.description: The surge/comeback mechanic is live and tuned but completely invisible. When a player enters surge mode, trigger a cinematic moment: pulsing amber border on their territory, a dramatic 'SURGE ACTIVE' HUD banner with a countdown timer, and an audio sting. Opponents see a political signal. The surging player feels momentum shift. This transforms a passive statistical buff into a narrative turning point.
items.recipe: In VaultFrontLayer.ts, subscribe to VaultFrontStatusUpdate.surgeState. On surge entry, apply CSS animation class to TerritoryLayer tiles owned by that player and show a SurgeChronicleOverlay component with countdown from surgeDurationTicks. Emit audio via the existing Fx system.

items.title: Last Stand — server-wide event when one player controls 5+ vault sites
items.description: When any single player holds 5 or more vault sites simultaneously, broadcast a 'Last Stand' server alert to all players and activate a 90-second window where all opponents receive +40% convoy gold and +2 surge charge/tick. Creates emergent kingmaker dynamics, breaks dominant-player stagnation, and makes every match politically volatile near the endgame.
items.recipe: In VaultFrontExecution.ts tickVaultSites(), after each capture, count sites per player. When a player crosses the 5-site threshold, fire a new GameUpdateType.LAST_STAND_ACTIVATED event. Server broadcasts it; client VaultFrontLayer renders the event as a full-width alert banner and applies the gold multiplier for all opponents in VaultFrontExecution for 90s.

items.title: Convoy intercept predictor — real-time risk gauge on active routes
items.description: Active convoys have rich risk math (routeRisk, rewardMultiplier) but players see none of it. Show a live 0–100% interception-probability gauge on each convoy in the VaultFrontLayer HUD, updated every 10 ticks based on enemy troop positions along the route corridor. High-risk convoys pulse red; low-risk pulse green. Transforms convoy routing from a blind bet into a tactical calculation.
items.recipe: Add a computeInterceptRisk(convoy, game) function that scores the corridor between sourceTile and destinationTile by enemy troop density within 15 tiles. Expose via VaultFrontStatusUpdate. In VaultFrontLayer.ts, render a thin gradient bar under each convoy icon.

items.title: AI battle narrative — post-game match story generated by Claude Haiku
items.description: After each match, pass the structured event log (vault captures, convoy deliveries, surge activations, execution chains, final scores) to Claude Haiku and generate a 3-paragraph 'battle chronicle' narrating the key turning points in an epic tone. Display in WinModal.ts alongside the score. One-click share as text card. Token cost: ~800 tok/match via claude-haiku-4-5; measure via context-meter ledger.
items.recipe: In WinModal.ts (or server-side in GameManager.ts post-match hook), collect the top 8 game events from the event log. POST to a new /api/battle-narrative endpoint that calls Claude Haiku with a structured prompt template. Return HTML fragment; inject into WinModal. Current estimated cost: $0.0003/match at haiku pricing.

items.title: Mutator vote — players choose next week's mutator at game end
items.description: Present 3 mutator options in the WinModal immediately after game end. Players tap one. Server tallies votes per week; whichever option reaches 1,000 votes first (or most votes by Sunday midnight UTC) becomes next week's weeklyMutator. Drives weekly return visits and gives players agency. Announce winner in-game chat at weekly reset.
items.recipe: Add POST /api/mutator-vote {option: string} endpoint in Server.ts. Store in a new mutator_votes table. VaultSeasonScheduler.ts selects top vote at weekly rollover and writes vaultWeeklyMutator to config. WinModal.ts shows 3 MutatorVoteButton components after score reveal.

items.title: Execution chain combometer — Street Fighter-style HUD for vault chain combos
items.description: The executionChainStep system is a 3-step combo that gives gold multipliers, but there is no visual feedback at all. Players likely don't know it exists. Add a combometer: 3 diamond icons in GameLeftSidebar.ts that fill as the chain progresses (dim → lit → pulsing gold on step 3). Flash a 'CLEAN EXECUTION ×1.2' banner on chain completion. Reset with a shatter animation on break.
items.recipe: Subscribe to VaultFrontStatusUpdate.executionChainState in UILayer or GameLeftSidebar. Render 3 SVG diamonds that transition fill color via CSS. On CHAIN_COMPLETE (step 3), trigger a 1.5s HeadsUpMessage 'CLEAN EXECUTION ×1.2'. On CHAIN_BREAK, play shatter particle fx via FxLayer.

items.title: Achievement spotlight — trophy moment in post-game screen on first unlock
items.description: Currently achievements only show as a small toast mid-game. If a player unlocks their first achievement in a session, pause the WinModal reveal for 3 seconds and show a full-panel achievement card with trophy animation, achievement name, and unlock count. This is the 'holy shit' moment that makes players tell friends.
items.recipe: In WinModal.ts, before rendering the score breakdown, check if any new achievements were unlocked this session (flag via AchievementStore.checkAndUnlock() result). If yes, show AchievementSpotlightPanel for 3s (CSS animation, then auto-advance to score). AchievementToast.ts can be adapted as the animation base.

items.title: Surge visibility — pulsing territory tint when any player is in surge
items.description: When a player is in surge mode, their territory tiles should pulse with a warm amber overlay so opponents can see the threat. Currently surge is purely numerical. 2-hour change to TerritoryLayer with a CSS keyframe animation and a player-ID lookup against the surge state published in VaultFrontStatusUpdate.
items.recipe: In TerritoryLayer.ts, read surgeUntilTick from the VaultFrontStatusUpdate. For each tile owned by a surging player, overlay a semi-transparent amber fill using Canvas globalAlpha and a sine-wave intensity factor keyed to Date.now(). No new data needed — surgeUntilTick is already published.

items.title: ELO placement system + visual rank progression bar
items.description: EloRating.ts is a clean K=32 utility but there are no placement matches, no rank badge display, and no seasonal decay. Add: (1) first-5-games placement phase with K=64, (2) a rank badge (Bronze→Grandmaster) shown in PlayerPanel and leaderboard, (3) a progress bar showing % to next tier, (4) seasonal soft-reset (-200 elo cap) at VaultSeasonScheduler reset. Drives competitive return engagement.
items.recipe: Extend PlayerStatsStore.ts with matchCount and placementComplete fields. Modify EloRating.calculate() caller in GameManager.ts to use K=64 for placement. Add RankBadge component to PlayerPanel.ts and LeaderboardPlayerList.ts using EloRating.ratingLabel(). Extend VaultSeasonScheduler to apply soft-reset on season rollover.

items.title: Replay highlight clipping — shareable 30-second game moments
items.description: ReplayHighlightStore.ts and ReplayPanel.ts exist but there is no share mechanism. Add a 'Clip This' button in ReplayPanel that packages the current replay timestamp ±15s into a shareable URL like /replay/<id>?t=<tick>. Server serves the clip URL as a metadata-rich page (OG tags with map thumbnail). Primary viral acquisition loop for browser RTS.
items.recipe: Add a ClipButton to ReplayPanel.ts. On click, POST /api/replay/<id>/clip {startTick, endTick} to ReplayStore.ts. Store clip metadata and return a short URL. Add an Express route for /clip/<clipId> that serves OpenGraph meta tags using GamePreviewBuilder.ts. Total: ~80 lines backend, ~30 lines UI.

items.title: Smart spectator camera — auto-follow highest-action zone
items.description: SpectatorBus.ts exists. Spectator camera is currently manual. Add an 'Auto' mode that scores each region every 120 ticks by (active_troop_density × 0.4 + vault_capture_activity × 0.4 + convoy_proximity × 0.2) and smoothly pans to the top-scoring region. Override on user click. Makes spectating and streaming much more engaging without any gameplay changes.
items.recipe: Add SpectatorAutoCamera class that subscribes to GameUpdateType events and maintains a heatmap over map tiles, decaying by half every 300 ticks. In ClientGameRunner.ts spectator mode, if autoCamera.enabled, call gameRenderer.setViewCenter(autoCamera.topRegionCenter()) every 5s with a lerp. Toggle via 'A' key shortcut.

items.title: Post-game micro-feedback — 3-emoji signal capture at game end
items.description: Trust is at 52% and proposals/sessions signal gaps are flagged. Add 3 emoji buttons to WinModal.ts: '🔥 Epic match' / '⚖️ Felt balanced' / '😤 Something was off'. Single tap, no forced typing. Feed results into weekly mutator weighting. Closes the primary signal gap identified in startup brief without friction. Measurement: track feedback_rate = votes/games; target >30%.
items.recipe: Add MicroFeedbackBar component to WinModal.ts below score reveal. On tap, POST /api/match-feedback {matchId, signal: 'epic'|'balanced'|'off'}. Store in match_feedback table. In VaultSeasonScheduler, factor signal distribution into mutator selection weight. Total: ~40 lines.

items.title: Ghost convoy — pay gold to dispatch a decoy route
items.description: New strategic mechanic: for 50,000 gold, dispatch a 'ghost convoy' that appears on opponent intel as a real high-value convoy but carries no reward on arrival. The deception is revealed at destination. Creates a mind-game layer over convoy routing and forces opponents to choose between interdicting (wasting troops) and ignoring (potentially missing a real convoy). Intel operations must be enabled.
items.recipe: Add ghostConvoy: boolean field to VaultConvoy interface. In VaultConvoyCommandExecution.ts, handle a GHOST_ROUTE command that creates a convoy with ghostConvoy=true, goldReward=0n. In VaultFrontStatusUpdate, broadcast ghost convoys as real to opponents' client updates but flag them as ghost to the owner. Reveal on arrival.

items.title: Mutator variety expansion — 8 new weekly mutators
items.description: Only 3 weekly mutators exist. Add 8 more: gold_rush (all convoy rewards ×2), blitz (convoy speed ×1.5), no_mercy (surge disabled), contested (vault sites reset every 10 min), shield_escort (escort grants 30s immunity), fog_of_war (convoy destinations hidden from opponents), rally_point (squad objective radius ×1.5), execution_rush (execution chain window ×2). Doubles rotational variety.
items.recipe: Extend weeklyMutator union type in VaultFrontExecution.ts. Add 8 new string literals. Handle each in the relevant tick/compute methods (tickConvoys for speed/rewards, tickVaultSites for reset, computeInterceptRisk for fog, etc.). Add label mappings in init() displayMessage block.

items.title: Dynamic vault site scaling — raise cap to 8 + contested vacancy mechanic
items.description: maxSites is hard-capped at 5. Raise to 8 for maps with 8+ players (more contested objectives = more strategic diversity). Additionally, if a site has no controller for 10+ minutes (600 ticks), broadcast a 'Vacant Vault' alert and double its next-capture reward for 5 minutes. Turns dead map zones into late-game flashpoints.
items.recipe: In createVaultSites(), change max 5 to Math.min(8, ...) and gate the upper range on game.allPlayers().length >= 8. In tickVaultSites(), track uncontrolled duration per site and emit VACANT_VAULT_ALERT at 600 ticks uncontrolled; apply reducedRewardNextCapture=false and a 2× gold multiplier for the next 300 ticks.

items.title: Bot AI VaultFront awareness — bots contest vault sites and route convoys
items.description: BotExecution.ts is 128 lines. Bots delete all structures on spawn and ignore all VaultFront mechanics. This breaks solo play entirely — an AI opponent that never competes for vault sites makes the VaultFront layer irrelevant in single-player. Add vault site targeting (20% bias toward vault tiles in AiAttackBehavior), convoy dispatching (random convoy every 90–180 ticks), and beacon usage to BotExecution.
items.recipe: In AiAttackBehavior.ts, score neighbor tiles: add +50 to any tile adjacent to an uncontrolled vault site. In BotExecution.tick(), add maybeDispatchConvoy() that fires VaultConvoyCommandExecution at random intervals. Remove the deleteAllStructures() call or gate it behind a bot-tier flag. Bot should retain Defense Posts.

items.title: API auth hardening — validate VaultFrontCommand payloads + rate limiting
items.description: VaultFrontCommand payloads are queued from client messages. Verify server-side: (1) command issuer is alive and owns the referenced convoy/site, (2) rate-limit VaultFront commands to 5/s per player to prevent gold-mining exploits, (3) ensure ghostConvoy flag cannot be forged by client. Security-critical before ghost convoy ships.
items.recipe: In handleQueuedCommands() in VaultFrontExecution.ts, add guard clauses: verify player.isAlive() and convoy.ownerID === command.issuerId. Add a per-player command timestamp ring buffer (last 5 ticks) to enforce rate limit. Add to existing server-side input validation in Server.ts.

items.title: Context-meter ledger wiring — accurate session cost tracking
items.description: context-meter.mjs currently runs in heuristic mode (confidence: 'heuristic'). Wire the ledger entries so ANTHROPIC_API_KEY usage is tracked and reported. Target: switch confidence from 'heuristic' to 'ledger'. Measurement: compare context-meter --json before/after for ledgerEntries > 0. Expected token savings: none directly, but enables data-driven decisions on which scripts burn most context.
items.recipe: Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in .env.local (dev only). In context-meter.mjs, confirm ledger path is writeable. Run one session with key present and verify ledgerEntries increments. Document in scripts/README.

items.title: Missing studio infra scripts — write stubs for blocker-rules, task-board, ops, staleness
items.description: 4 scripts are missing and breaking studio workflow: lib/blocker-rules.mjs (imported by blocker-preflight.mjs), lib/task-board.mjs (imported by render-startup-brief.mjs), ops.mjs (top-level orchestrator), check-brief-staleness.mjs. Write minimal implementations that satisfy the import contracts without full feature parity.
items.recipe: Write lib/blocker-rules.mjs that exports an empty RULES array. Write lib/task-board.mjs that reads context/TASK_BOARD.md and returns parsed open items. Write ops.mjs with blocker-preflight subcommand that delegates to blocker-preflight.mjs. Write check-brief-staleness.mjs that checks docs/STARTUP_BRIEF.md mtime vs 24h threshold.
